review_notes: The functions are mostly accurate and map well to Kubernetes security controls related to authenticator management. However, minor improvements in naming consistency could be considered for future iterations.
naming_improvements: Consider using 'k8s_apiserver_rbac_authorization_enabled' for consistency with other naming patterns.
title: Authenticator Management
step1_reasoning: The IA-5 control focuses on authenticator management, which in Kubernetes can be mapped to the management of authentication mechanisms and access controls. This includes ensuring that service accounts do not automatically mount tokens unless necessary, configuring OIDC for user authentication, and ensuring the API server has proper authentication and RBAC authorization enabled.
